command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute 
-- Update all other employees to use valid entity IDs
-- Most employees should be under L.A.W.S. Collective (ID 8)
UPDATE employees SET entityId = 8 WHERE entityId NOT IN (6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 30001, 30002, 30003, 30004);
